authoring_model.extraction_rule: extract stable runtime structure and governance shape; do not copy backend-only domain nouns, project paths, or acceptance semantics

routing_protocol.profile_selection_rule: prefer basic unless the target skill requires stage-specific runtime contracts, resident docs, and stage-switch discard governance
routing_protocol.machine_rule_source: Cli_Toolbox JSON outputs plus generated machine-readable contracts

basic.target_shape: single-axis entry-only skill facade with narrow references and optional runtime contract

staged_cli_first.target_shape: backend-derived staged skill facade with resident docs, stage contracts, runtime contract, and stage template kit

tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.create_skill_from_template: Create or refactor a skill from the governed template pack.
tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.skill_template: Return the basic entry-only facade template.
tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.staged_skill_template: Return the backend-derived staged facade template.
tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.contract_reference: Return the authoring contract for governed skills.
tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.staged_skill_reference: Return the generalized staged profile extracted from 3-Octupos-OS-Backend.
tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.runtime_contract_template: Return the staged runtime contract template asset.
tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.architecture_playbook: Return the architecture playbook for skill authoring.
tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.runtime_contract: Return this skill's own runtime contract.

asset_contracts.generated_output_expectation: generated skills must be directly editable, facade-first, and consistent with the selected profile without requiring post-generation structural patching

governance_rules: SKILL.md must remain an entry-only facade, not a pile of governance details.
The default template surface follows the proven 7-section facade extracted from 3-Octupos-OS-Backend.
If a skill has runtime rules, the model must consume machine-readable contracts through CLI outputs instead of treating markdown as the runtime rule source.

staged_cli_first skills must explicitly define top-level resident docs, stage order, stage checklist, stage doc contract, stage command contract, stage graph contract, and stage-switch discard policy.
Template clusters must separate human-readable markdown anchors from machine-readable contracts.
Do not copy backend-specific domain nouns, fixed runtime paths, or acceptance semantics into generic templates.
Prefer whole-template rewrites over patch stacking when the architecture contract changes.
When template governance changes, update SKILL facade, runtime contracts, references, assets, generator logic, tooling docs, and regression checks together.
validation_closure: generate at least one basic skill sandbox
generate at least one staged skill sandbox
verify staged assets include stage checklist and contract quartet
keep tooling docs and regression tests in sync with generator behavior
notes: The facade shape replaces the older generic abstract-layer/business-layer heading scheme with a backend-proven routing facade.
